  • Personal Information

    2. The CITY does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, marital or veteran status, political affiliation, disabled status, gender identity/expression or any other legally protected status. Print in ink or type answers to each question clearly and completely. This is an application for employment and no employment contract is being offered. The CITY may change wages, benefits, and conditions of employment at any time.
    17. Do you have a CDL driver's license?*
    18. Do you have a driver's license?
    19. (If tentatively selected applicants applying for a position where driving is required will be required to furnish a copy of their driving record at their expense prior to employment.)
    21. Have you ever been convicted of a felony or pled "no contest" to a felony?*
    25. If you are under 18 years of age, can you provide proof of your eligibility to work?
    27. Are you eligible to work in the United States?*
    29. Ponca City does not accept any of the older Microsoft document formats (those using the .DOC, .XLS, etc. file extensions). Emails with attached documents using this old format are rejected at our email server. Applicants must either save documents using the newer document formats (Office 2007 or newer), export them to .PDF files, or FAX them to Ponca City
    37. Continue

    Position Information

    4. If you are applying for the position of firefighter do you currently have EMT licensure or are you enrolled in the course work to obtain licensure? *
    6. If you checked yes and currently have EMT licensure please check what level?

      Disclaimer & Signature

      2. I certify that the answers given in this application are true and complete to the best of my knowledge and that intentional misrepresentations or omissions may be cause for the rejection of my application and that if hired I may be released from employment. I hereby grant permission to the CITY to investigate any information included in the application, including references and previous employers. I agree to submit to a medical examination and drug screen upon receiving a conditional offer of employment if required. I understand that this application is not a contract of employment and that the City is an “at will” employer, which means that the Employee may resign at any time and the City may discharge the Employee at any time, with or without cause. I hereby release the CITY OF PONCA CITY, all of the City OF PONCA CITY’S agents, my personal references, any previous employer and all of their agents from all liability in all investigations and inquiries relative to information contained in the application form I agree that any lawsuit relating to my service with the City of Ponca City must be filed no more than six months after the date of the employment action that is the subject of the lawsuit. I waive any statute of limitations to the contrary. This application is good only for a job opening that is posted at City Hall, 516 East Grand, Ponca City, Oklahoma, on the date of this application. A new application must be completed for each job posting applied for. The City of Ponca City is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

      6. Please only hit the submit button ONE time.  It may take a short bit for it to submit.
